task_summary: Implement a MAUI chat CollectionView with auto-scroll-to-bottom and left/right message bubbles driven by ObservableCollection.
skill_sections_used: Common gotchas (MainThread, EmptyView ContentView wrap, no ViewCell)
skill_usefulness_notes: Every technique required by the task (DataTemplateSelector, ScrollTo, ObservableCollection, MainThread gotcha, EmptyView wrapper) was explicitly documented in the skill. The skill reduced ambiguity to zero — no external documentation search was needed.
completeness_notes: All requested artifacts produced: XAML page, ViewModel, Message model, DataTemplateSelector, code-behind with scroll wiring.
code_quality_notes: Follows MAUI best practices: compiled bindings via x:DataType, ObservableCollection for reactivity, UI thread safety for scroll, callback pattern keeps ViewModel free of UI references, no ViewCell usage.
